detail.instructions: Add EmailAddress::as_str, then implement TryFrom<&str> for EmailAddress. Reject an empty string with Empty and text without @ with MissingAt.

hints.body: The conversion can fail, so the return type should be Result<Self, Self::Error>.
TryFrom has an associated Error type. Set it to EmailValidationError and return Self with a private value on success.
A canonical solution validates before constructing EmailAddress.

detail.completionExplanation: TryFrom makes validation part of the standard conversion API. Callers can use EmailAddress::try_from or try_into without learning a custom constructor name.

cases.name: direct-field-construction
